EERIE.Name: Name
EERIE.CondFatigue.Name: Fatigue
EERIE.CondFatigue.Desc: You are exhausted. -1 to all rolls.
EERIE.CondExhaustion.Name: Exhaustion
EERIE.CondInjury.Name: Injury
EERIE.CondInjury.Desc: Each action deals 1 damage to BODY.
EERIE.CondUncertainty.Name: Uncertainty
EERIE.CondApathy.Name: Apathy
EERIE.CondBroken.Name: Broken
EERIE.CondBroken.Desc: Each action deals 1 damage to MIND.
EERIE.TraitBreakthrough.Name: Breakthrough
EERIE.TraitBreakthrough.Desc: When pushing through debris, forcing doors, or breaking through groups of people, you do so with increased effectiveness.
EERIE.TraitJustAScratch.Name: Just a Scratch
EERIE.TraitJustAScratch.Desc: When you take 1 BODY damage, you may spend 1 WILL to ignore it.
EERIE.TraitThickSkin.Name: Thick Skin
EERIE.TraitThickSkin.Desc: You can ignore pain; all BODY checks related to it gain +1d.
EERIE.TraitHighPainThreshold.Name: High Pain Threshold
EERIE.TraitHighPainThreshold.Desc: When you take damage that would kill or knock you out, you may lose 1 MIND instead and remain conscious.
EERIE.TraitOnslaught.Name: Onslaught
EERIE.TraitOnslaught.Desc: When you attack in melee, you may spend 1 WILL to immediately knock the target down. All actions against that target gain either +1d or increased effectiveness.
EERIE.TraitDirtyTrick.Name: Dirty Trick
EERIE.TraitDirtyTrick.Desc: When you take BODY damage in melee, make a BODY check: deal the same amount to the attacker and 6 — avoid the damage, 4–5 — take the damage.
EERIE.TraitEvasion.Name: Evasion
EERIE.TraitEvasion.Desc: When you are attacked, you may spend 1 WILL to make a quick dash. On success, you completely avoid the damage.
EERIE.TraitDash.Name: Dash
EERIE.TraitDash.Desc: All movement checks are made with increased effectiveness.
EERIE.TraitUnbreakable.Name: Unbreakable
EERIE.TraitUnbreakable.Desc: You may absorb any amount of damage by spending equal WILL, fully negating it even if it exceeds your WILL.
EERIE.TraitInsight.Name: Insight
EERIE.TraitInsight.Desc: When attempting to pick a lock, decipher a code, or understand something complex, make a MIND check: 6 — recover 1 WILL. On failure — lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.TraitSharedFear.Name: Shared Fear
EERIE.TraitSharedFear.Desc: When someone nearby takes MIND damage, gain +1d to your next roll.
EERIE.TraitForesight.Name: Foresight
EERIE.TraitForesight.Desc: When someone is about to act, state your prediction aloud. If correct, recover 1 WILL and 1 MIND; however, all who can hear you take MIND damage.
EERIE.TraitSixthSense.Name: Sixth Sense
EERIE.TraitSixthSense.Desc: Any sudden damage can be ignored if you have at least 1 WILL (not consumed).
EERIE.TraitPlanning.Name: Planning
EERIE.TraitPlanning.Desc: You may propose a rational solution to a problem. If someone agrees to follow your plan, both of you gain +1d to your next action.
EERIE.TraitPreparedness.Name: Preparedness
EERIE.TraitPreparedness.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to pull a common but necessary item from your pocket.
EERIE.TraitDeduction.Name: Deduction
EERIE.TraitDeduction.Desc: When drawing conclusions, make a MIND check: 6 — ask 2 questions to the GM. 4–5 — ask 1 question. On failure — ask 1 question and lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.TraitComposure.Name: Composure
EERIE.TraitComposure.Desc: You may help another overcome fear or panic by guiding them rationally. Spend 1 WILL and make a MIND check: 6 — target recovers 2 WILL. 4–5 — target recovers 1 WILL.
EERIE.TraitMindBodyBalance.Name: Mind–Body Balance
EERIE.TraitMindBodyBalance.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to shift points between BODY and MIND (not exceeding the maximum).
EERIE.FeatCruelty.Name: Cruelty
EERIE.FeatCruelty.Desc: When you kill someone or commit a cruel act, you may gain 1 WILL. Anyone who witnesses this must make a MIND check.
EERIE.FeatImmunity.Name: Immunity
EERIE.FeatImmunity.Desc: All BODY damage is dealt at reduced effectiveness. If BODY is not at maximum, failed MIND checks inflict 1 BODY damage.
EERIE.FeatAdrenaline.Name: Adrenaline
EERIE.FeatAdrenaline.Desc: When you take damage, you may spend 1 WILL to make your next action with increased effectiveness.
EERIE.FeatCombatReflexes.Name: Combat Reflexes
EERIE.FeatCombatReflexes.Desc: You may use BODY instead of MIND when shooting.
EERIE.FeatPrecision.Name: Precision
EERIE.FeatPrecision.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to make your next shot deal +2 damage. On a 6, regain 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatOnTheEdge.Name: On the Edge
EERIE.FeatOnTheEdge.Desc: If BODY is at 0, shot effectiveness cannot be reduced.
EERIE.FeatDealWithMe.Name: Deal With Me
EERIE.FeatDealWithMe.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to take BODY damage intended for another.
EERIE.FeatRevival.Name: Revival
EERIE.FeatRevival.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to bring a target back to their senses without a MIND check.
EERIE.FeatMotivation.Name: Motivation
EERIE.FeatMotivation.Desc: When someone fails a check, you may spend 1 WILL to let them immediately reroll.
EERIE.FeatFieldMedicine.Name: Field Medicine
EERIE.FeatFieldMedicine.Desc: When providing first aid, you may spend 1 WILL and make a MIND check: 6 — restore 3 BODY. 4–5 — restore 2 BODY. Failure — target loses 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatJuryRigger.Name: Jury-Rigger
EERIE.FeatJuryRigger.Desc: Improvised weapons or tools have increased efficiency. On a 6, regain 1 WILL. On a failure, the weapon or tool breaks, dealing 1 damage to you.
EERIE.FeatRepair.Name: Repair
EERIE.FeatRepair.Desc: When attempting to fix something, make a MIND check: 6 — restore 1 MIND and 1 WILL. Failure — lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatFaith.Name: Faith
EERIE.FeatFaith.Desc: If MIND is not at maximum and you have at least 1 WILL, you may perform an action you truly believe in. 6 — restore MIND. Failure — lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatTrial.Name: Trial
EERIE.FeatTrial.Desc: When you take BODY damage, you may restore 1 WILL by accepting it as a spiritual trial.
EERIE.FeatPacifism.Name: Pacifism
EERIE.FeatPacifism.Desc: When witnessing violence, take 1 MIND damage. Your next check gains +1d and increased effectiveness.
EERIE.FeatLogicOverFear.Name: Logic over fear
EERIE.FeatLogicOverFear.Desc: When you take MIND damage, you may spend 1 WILL to rationalize the fear. Make a MIND check — on success, ignore all damage.
EERIE.FeatInnerFire.Name: Inner Fire
EERIE.FeatInnerFire.Desc: At 0 WILL, you become Desperate. All checks gain +1d. Additionally: 6 — regain 1 WILL. Failure — lose control and take 1 BODY or MIND damage.
EERIE.FeatIronWill.Name: Iron Will
EERIE.FeatIronWill.Desc: When you would be killed or become incapacitated, make a Desperate check with +1d. On any success, you remain conscious; on a 6, gain 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatMerryFellow.Name: Merry Fellow
EERIE.FeatMerryFellow.Desc: When attempting to cheer someone up, spend 1 WILL to make a MIND check: 6 — all nearby allies gain +1d to their next check.
EERIE.FeatEncouragement.Name: Encouragement
EERIE.FeatEncouragement.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to grant a target increased effectiveness on their next MIND check. If they fail, you lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatThisWontAffectMe.Name: This won’t affect me
EERIE.FeatThisWontAffectMe.Desc: When someone nearby takes MIND damage, your next check gains increased effectiveness.
EERIE.FeatDontTrust.Name: Don’t Trust
EERIE.FeatDontTrust.Desc: While acting alone, gain +1d to all checks. If others are present, on a failure you take 1 MIND damage.
EERIE.FeatPawnsOnTheBoard.Name: Pawns on the Board
EERIE.FeatPawnsOnTheBoard.Desc: If you know another character’s Solace, you may spend 1 WILL to command them. They must make a MIND check: 6 — unaffected. 1–5 — must spend 1 WILL to resist, or do what you said.
EERIE.FeatListenToMe.Name: Listen to Me
EERIE.FeatListenToMe.Desc: When you give someone advice or explain how to act, you may spend 1 WILL. If the target follows your guidance, their next check gains +1d. If they ignore you and suffer a consequence, you regain 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatIronVow.Name: Iron Vow
EERIE.FeatIronVow.Desc: When making a promise, spend 1 WILL to gain increased effectiveness on a related action. If broken, lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.FeatFollower.Name: Follower
EERIE.FeatFollower.Desc: When you carry out instructions and would take damage: MIND damage may be ignored by spending 1 WILL. BODY damage also inflicts 1 MIND damage.
EERIE.FeatLeadMe.Name: Lead Me
EERIE.FeatLeadMe.Desc: You may spend 1 WILL to have another character tell you what to do. The chosen action gains increased effectiveness. On a failure, you lose 1 WILL.
EERIE.Solace-1-1: Solace: A small object that is interesting to look at.
EERIE.Solace-1-2: Solace: A photo or image of a loved one or a familiar place.
EERIE.Solace-1-3: Solace: A deck of playing or collectible cards.
EERIE.Solace-1-4: Solace: A light source — a candle, flashlight, or matches.
EERIE.Solace-1-5: Solace: Creative expression — drawing symbols or sketches.
EERIE.Solace-1-6: Solace: Observing familiar objects in the environment.
EERIE.Solace-2-1: Solace: A music box, small instrument, or portable player.
EERIE.Solace-2-2: Solace: Calm self-talk spoken out loud.
EERIE.Solace-2-4: Solace: The sound of people laughing.
EERIE.Solace-2-5: Solace: Tapping out a familiar rhythm.
EERIE.Solace-2-6: Solace: Listening to familiar sounds in the environment.
EERIE.Solace-3-1: Solace: A vial of aroma oil or a pouch of herbs.
EERIE.Solace-3-4: Solace: The smell of favorite food.
EERIE.Solace-3-6: Solace: Noticing familiar scents in the environment.
EERIE.Solace-4-1: Solace: A small object that feels pleasant to touch.
EERIE.Solace-4-3: Solace: Repetitive mechanical interaction with an object.
EERIE.Solace-4-4: Solace: Fabric or an item with a comforting texture.
EERIE.Solace-4-6: Solace: Applying physical force to something until it breaks.
EERIE.Solace-6-1: Solace: Meditation or breathing exercises in silence.
EERIE.Solace-6-3: Solace: Keeping a journal or notes.
EERIE.Solace-6-5: Solace: Memories of home, loved ones, or pleasant events.
EERIE.Solace-6-6: Solace: Mental tasks that require concentration.
EERIE.Quirk-2-1: A quiet voice, almost a whisper
EERIE.Quirk-3-2: Always fidgeting with something in their hands
EERIE.Quirk-3-4: Sweats constantly, even in the cold
EERIE.Quirk-3-5: Moves in an oddly unnatural way
EERIE.Quirk-4-3: Frequently looks around, as if on edge
EERIE.Quirk-4-5: Always wears gloves, even in heat
EERIE.Quirk-4-6: Bites their lips until they bleed
EERIE.Quirk-5-1: Refers to themselves in the third person
EERIE.Quirk-5-3: Strong smell of tobacco or alcohol
EERIE.Quirk-5-4: Speech filled with strange words or quotes
EERIE.Quirk-6-4: Keeps hands in pockets, even while talking
EERIE.SettingsCritReliefHint: If enabled, a Critical Success restores +1 Will and Mind (up to maximum).
EERIE.SettingsPersonalityChatHint: Whether to post the personality generation results to the public chat.
EERIE.SettingsTrackerHint: Show ticks tracker on the item.
